title: Thermal: Extra
description: Add tiers of augments and new machines to Thermal Expansion!
body:
![thermal extra logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121-Mods/ThermalExtra/master/src/main/resources/assets/thermal_extra/ThermalExtraLogo.png)
### Thermal Extra is a Thermal Expansion addon that add more augments to the thermal serie.

# Metals
Thermal extra add 4 metals : soul infused, shellite, twinite and dragonsteel.

each metal has its own molten fluid, ingot/nugget/block/dust and a hardened glass block made from the metal.

# Augments
Therma extra add 5 augment tiers as follow : soul infused > enderium > shellite > twinite > dragonsteel > dragonsteel infused.

dragonsteel and dragonsteel infused only support a few augment type.

# Machines
Thermal Extra add new 5 machines and 1 dynamo.

# Credits
- Fluids textures made with Material Maker based on RCXCrafted's fluids files.

[![Kinecic Hosting banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121/Branding/master/KineticHosting.png) ](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=540)
